title: Velocity-Sensitive Drum Pad Mouse Callback
description: Panel mouse callback that triggers MIDI notes via Synth.addNoteOn and Synth.addNoteOff for chord playback. Mouse Y position maps to velocity, providing velocity-sensitive drum pad behavior with proper note-off on mouse release.

validation.notes: Mouse callback - compile-only test, can't simulate mouse events

title: Server GET Request with Authentication
description: Server.callWithGET used for HTTP authentication with custom Content-Type header via Server.setHttpHeader. Demonstrates passing credentials as GET parameter and POST body to a REST API endpoint.

validation.skipReason: Server.* API calls require external network connectivity

title: Regex Number Detection in Strings
description: Engine.matchesRegex with a digit-only pattern (^\\d+$) to filter and parse numeric strings from a mixed array. Uses parseInt to convert matched strings to integers.

validation.notes: Regex filters numeric strings, parseInt prints 1 and 127

title: Flex AHDSR Envelope Full LAF Customization
description: Complete Look and Feel customization for the FlexAHDSR envelope component using registerFunction for background, path, curve points, segments, and position indicator. Demonstrates layered glow rendering with beginLayer, gradient fills, and pulsing animation via Engine.getUptime.

validation.notes: FlexAHDSR LAF - compile-only

title: Neural Amp Modeler File Loading
description: Engine.createNeuralNetwork and loadNAMModel used to load a NAM JSON model file from the AudioFiles folder. Demonstrates the FileSystem API chain for loading neural network models in HISE.

validation.skipReason: Requires NAM model file in AudioFiles folder that doesn't exist in test environment

title: Wavetable Loading via Button Text
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor to load wavetable files by button name. Uses Content.getAllComponents to batch-assign a single setControlCallback to all matching buttons.

validation.notes: WavetableSynth available in full module list. setFile with PROJECT_FOLDER will fail but compile should pass.

title: Wavetable HWT Export
description: Synth.getWavetableController and saveAsHwt used to export a precomputed HWT wavetable file. FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.AudioFiles) provides the output directory for the exported file.

validation.notes: WavetableSynth available in full module list. saveAsHwt will write but compile should pass.

title: ComboBox Transparent Popup Menu LAF
description: Custom Look and Feel for ComboBox popup menus using drawPopupMenuBackground with transparent fill and drawPopupMenuItem with rounded rectangle highlights. Demonstrates per-item styling with highlight state and custom text alignment.

validation.notes: Popup menu LAF - compile-only

title: SVG Logo Drawing on Panel
description: Content.createSVG with base64-encoded path data drawn on a dynamically created panel via setPaintRoutine and g.drawSVG. Shows the full workflow of creating an SVG, adding a panel with Content.addPanel, and rendering it.

validation.notes: Self-contained SVG + addPanel - compile-only

title: Audio Pool File Browser with ComboBox
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool combined with Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor to populate a ComboBox with pooled audio file names. Strips the PROJECT_FOLDER prefix and file extension for display, then loads the selected file via setFile on selection.

validation.notes: AudioLooper provides AudioSampleProcessor interface

title: Keyboard Key Colour Range Setup
description: Engine.setKeyColour used in loops to visually distinguish active from inactive key ranges on the virtual keyboard. Darkens keys outside the playable range and highlights the active zone with a semi-transparent overlay.

validation.notes: Self-contained key colour setup - compile-only

title: Dynamic ScriptNode Effect Chain Ordering
description: Engine.createDspNetwork with dsp.get and setParent to dynamically reorder effects within named container slots at runtime. Demonstrates creating a scriptable signal chain where effects can be moved between slots or removed using index -1.

validation.skipReason: Requires DSP network with specific named nodes (reverb, delay, slot1, slot2) that can't be created via Builder API

title: CSS Styled Label with Inline Stylesheet
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with setInlineStyleSheet to apply CSS styling to a Label component. Covers label, input, and ::selection selectors with properties like letter-spacing, text-shadow, caret-color, and padding for a fully styled text input.

validation.notes: CSS styled label - compile-only

title: Floating Tile Child Tooltips with CSS Selectors
description: setChildTooltips used to assign descriptive tooltips to individual sub-components of a floating tile via CSS-style selectors (.class, #id). Enables targeted tooltip assignment for complex composite UI elements like the modulation matrix.

validation.skipReason: API does not exist: ScriptFloatingTile.setChildTooltips — not part of the HISE scripting API (proposed feature from forum post, never implemented)

title: SVG Icon in Peak Meter LAF
description: Content.createSVG with drawMatrixPeakMeter LAF callback to render an SVG icon scaled by peak level. Uses g.drawSVG with obj.peaks[0] as the opacity parameter for level-reactive icon display.

validation.notes: Self-contained SVG + LAF - compile-only

title: Random User Preset Loader
description: Engine.getUserPresetList with Math.randInt to load a random user preset on button press via Engine.loadUserPreset. Demonstrates a complete random preset selection pattern with control callback.

validation.skipReason: Engine.loadUserPreset triggers runtime error with demo project presets during compilation

title: Windows Machine GUID via Background Task
description: Engine.createBackgroundTask with runProcess to execute a Windows registry query for the MachineGuid. Demonstrates running an external process asynchronously with a completion callback that parses the output string.

validation.notes: Background task with runProcess - compiles fine, process won't execute on macOS

title: Knob with Modulation Arc Display
description: connectToModulatedParameter used to enable modulation arc rendering on a ScriptSlider without changing its control behavior. Requires both the connectToModulatedParameter call and matching processorId/parameterId properties.

validation.notes: connectToModulatedParameter needs the filter module to exist

title: Viewport Scroll Position Timer Workaround
description: Engine.createTimerObject used as a one-shot timer to set a Viewport scroll position after initialization. Demonstrates the pattern of deferring a property change via a short timer with stopTimer in the callback.

validation.notes: Timer-based scroll position set - compile-only

title: Modwheel and Pitchwheel Visual Display
description: Panel paint routines driven by onController MIDI callback to display modwheel (CC1) and pitchwheel (CC128) positions as filled bar graphs. Uses Synth.deferCallbacks to safely update graphics from the controller callback, with repaint triggered by setValue/repaint pattern.

validation.notes: Self-contained with addPanel and onController MIDI callback - compile-only

title: MIDI Player Note Rectangle Display
description: Synth.getMidiPlayer with getNoteRectangleList and connectToPanel for a custom MIDI note visualization. Scales note positions to fill the panel height based on pitch range, draws rounded rectangles with outlines, and shows a playback position line updated via setRepaintOnPositionChange.

validation.notes: MIDI player note display - compile-only (paint routine)

title: Global Routing Data Cable Send
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with getCable and sendData to transmit JSON data objects between ScriptFX modules and the UI via global routing cables. Demonstrates the sender side of a cross-module data communication pattern.

validation.notes: Global routing manager + data cable - compile-only

title: Effect Bypass with Button Callback
description: Synth.getEffect with setBypassed toggled from a button control callback via setControlCallback. Shows the complete pattern for scripted effect bypass control including the generic script reference.

validation.notes: ParametriqEQ type doesn't exist - trying CurveEq as closest match

title: Custom Keyboard Image-Based LAF
description: drawWhiteNote and drawBlackNote LAF functions using loadImage and drawImage to render a custom keyboard with separate up/down state images. Uses a namespace wrapper and FloatingTile local look and feel for the keyboard component.

validation.skipReason: loadImage with {PROJECT_FOLDER} paths - image files don't exist in test environment

title: Background Task Kill Voices
description: Engine.createBackgroundTask with killVoicesAndCall to safely execute heavyweight operations on the sample loading thread after killing all active voices. Used for operations like sample map loading that require voice silence.

values: I'm on the sample loading thread

validation.notes: killVoicesAndCall runs callback which prints to console

expected: I'm on the sample loading thread
actual: I'm on the sample loading thread

title: Note Range Key Filter
description: Message.getNoteNumber with Message.ignoreEvent in onNoteOn to restrict playback to a defined key range. Notes outside the LOW_KEY to HIGH_KEY range are silently ignored.

validation.notes: onNoteOn MIDI callback - compile-only, can't trigger via API

title: Panel as DAW Plugin Parameter
description: ScriptPanel configured as a plugin parameter with isPluginParameter and pluginParameterName properties, using Engine.createUserPresetHandler with sendParameterGesture for proper DAW automation gesture reporting. Includes mouse drag interaction with setValue/changed pattern and preprocessor guard for HISE_SEND_PANEL_CHANGED_TO_PLUGIN_PARAMETER.

validation.notes: Self-contained panel as plugin parameter with mouse callback - compile-only

title: Broadcaster Tooltip with Delayed Show
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and addDelayedListener to implement a hovering tooltip that appears after 500ms of mouse inactivity. Tracks global mouse position via getGlobalPositionX/Y and repositions a hidden panel on delayed callback.

validation.notes: Broadcaster tooltip with addPanel - compile-only

title: Loris Spectral Pitch Lock Function
description: Inline function for Loris spectral processing that locks partial frequencies to the nearest harmonic ratio of the root frequency. Interpolates between locked and original frequencies using a pitchLockAmount factor, with separate noiseGain control for bandwidth.

validation.skipReason: References undefined variables (pitchFactor, noiseGain, pitchLockAmount) from larger Loris project context

title: Timestretch Tempo Sync via Transport Handler
description: Engine.createTransportHandler with setOnTempoChange callback to dynamically adjust Synth.getSampler timestretch ratio based on host tempo. Uses getTimestretchOptions and setTimestretchOptions to configure SkipLatency before enabling tempo-synced playback.

validation.notes: Timestretch tempo sync - compile-only

title: Quadrilateral Path Drawing
description: Content.createPath with addQuadrilateral to draw a four-sided polygon (trapezoid) from corner point arrays. Demonstrates the simplified path construction compared to manual startNewSubPath/lineTo sequences.

validation.notes: Quadrilateral path drawing on panel - compile-only

title: Bipolar Pan Slider LAF
description: drawLinearSlider LAF with bipolar fill rendering from center point for a pan-style slider. Calculates fill direction based on whether value is left or right of center, with a draggable handle showing the numeric display value.

validation.notes: Bipolar pan slider LAF - compile-only

title: Audio Waveform Render Options LAF
description: getThumbnailRenderOptions LAF callback to customize audio waveform rendering quality by adjusting manualDownSampleFactor. Allows overriding the default downsampling for smoother waveform display in ScriptAudioWaveform components.

validation.notes: Audio waveform render options LAF - compile-only

title: Broadcaster-Based Tab Switcher Panel
description: Namespace utility using Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentValue and addComponentPropertyListener to create a tab-switching system. Automatically discovers child panels via getChildComponents and toggles visibility based on a switcher panel's value.

validation.notes: SwitcherPanel namespace utility - just defines a function, never called. Compile-only.

title: WebView MIDI Controller Forwarding
description: WebView callFunction used in onController to forward MIDI CC data to a WebView's JavaScript context. Passes controller number and value as a JSON object for web-based MIDI visualization or control mapping.

validation.notes: WebView MIDI forwarding in onController - compile-only

title: Loris Cross-Synthesis Pitch Shift
description: Engine.getLorisManager with analyse, createEnvelopePaths, and process to perform cross-synthesis between two audio files. Extracts frequency envelopes from one file and applies them as pitch shift to another, then synthesises and exports the result.

validation.skipReason: Requires specific audio files (deep_piano_noise.wav, SonidoVoz.wav) in AudioFiles folder and Loris spectral processing

title: File Browser for IR Sample Loading
description: FileSystem.browse with a wildcard filter and callback to let users select an IR sample file at runtime. Demonstrates the browse-to-load pattern for impulse response files with an inline function button callback.

validation.skipReason: FileSystem.browse opens modal dialog that blocks execution

title: Viewport Table Mode with Columns and Callbacks
description: Viewport setTableMode, setTableColumns, and setTableRowData to create a data table with Text, Button, and Slider column types. Includes setTableCallback for handling row click interactions on the table data.

validation.notes: Viewport table mode - compile-only, getTableRowData not accessible via REPL

title: Display Buffer Waveform Visualization
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with getDisplayBuffer and setRingBufferProperties to visualize a hardcoded effect's audio output. Uses createPath to generate a waveform path in the panel's paint routine, with a timer-driven repaint for real-time updates.

validation.skipReason: HardcodedMasterFX module has no display buffer data without a loaded scriptnode network
